tasks.label: verify-desktop-client
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; $p = Start-Process -FilePath '.\dist\DMS_Client.exe' -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5000' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { Write-Host 'HTTP_OK' } else { Write-Host ('HTTP_FAIL:' + $r.StatusCode) } } catch { Write-Host 'HTTP_FAIL' }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force

tasks.label: cleanup-generated-files
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; if (Test-Path build) { Remove-Item build -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path dist) { Remove-Item dist -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path dms.db) { Remove-Item dms.db -Force }; if (Test-Path equipment.db) { Remove-Item equipment.db -Force }; Write-Host 'cleanup done'

tasks.label: cleanup-cache-dirs
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; if (Test-Path .pytest_cache) { Remove-Item .pytest_cache -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path __pycache__) { Remove-Item __pycache__ -Recurse -Force }; Write-Host 'cache cleanup done'

tasks.label: remove-empty-deployment-dirs
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; if ((Test-Path deploy) -and -not (Get-ChildItem deploy -Force | Select-Object -First 1)) { Remove-Item deploy -Force }; if ((Test-Path migrate) -and -not (Get-ChildItem migrate -Force | Select-Object -First 1)) { Remove-Item migrate -Force }; Write-Host 'empty dirs removed'

tasks.label: remove-docs-tests
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; $files = @('README.md','openapi.yaml','dms-prd-2026-05-11.md','tests\__init__.py','tests\test_api.py','tests\test_auth.py','tests\test_esign.py','tests\test_maintenance.py','tests\test_password_and_bell.py','docs\API_REFERENCE.md','docs\ARCHITECTURE.md','docs\DEPLOYMENT.md','docs\DEVELOPMENT.md','docs\使用手册.md'); foreach ($f in $files) { if (Test-Path $f) { Remove-Item $f -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Remove-Item docs\screenshots\* -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ((Test-Path docs\screenshots) -and -not (Get-ChildItem docs\screenshots -Force | Select-Object -First 1)) { Remove-Item docs\screenshots -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if ((Test-Path docs) -and -not (Get-ChildItem docs -Force | Select-Object -First 1)) { Remove-Item docs -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if ((Test-Path tests) -and -not (Get-ChildItem tests -Force | Select-Object -First 1)) { Remove-Item tests -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'docs/tests cleanup done'

tasks.label: remove-tests-and-readme
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; $files = @('README.md','openapi.yaml','dms-prd-2026-05-11.md','tests\__init__.py','tests\test_api.py','tests\test_auth.py','tests\test_esign.py','tests\test_maintenance.py','tests\test_password_and_bell.py'); foreach ($f in $files) { if (Test-Path $f) { Remove-Item $f -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; if ((Test-Path tests) -and -not (Get-ChildItem tests -Force | Select-Object -First 1)) { Remove-Item tests -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'tests/readme cleanup done'

tasks.label: remove-tests-pycache
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; if (Test-Path tests\__pycache__) { Remove-Item tests\__pycache__ -Recurse -Force }; if ((Test-Path tests) -and -not (Get-ChildItem tests -Force | Select-Object -First 1)) { Remove-Item tests -Force }; Write-Host 'tests pycache cleanup done'

tasks.label: run-and-probe-dms-client
args: Set-Location 'D:\EquipmentManagement_client'; $p = Start-Process -FilePath .\dist\DMS_Client.exe -PassThru; $url='http://127.0.0.1:5000'; $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds(25); $ok = $false; while((Get-Date) -lt $deadline){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { $ok = $true; Write-Host 'HTTP_OK'; break } } catch { } Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 250 }; if ($ok) { Write-Host 'Server responded 200' } else { Write-Host 'Server did not respond in time' }; if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'process stopped'
